# Aniwa

> Digital marketing agency with over 10 years of experience based in Chihuahua, México. We help businesses and small companies grow through comprehensive digital strategies.

## Services

- [Web Development](https://beaniwa.com/en/services): Modern, responsive websites optimized for conversions.
- [Social Media](https://beaniwa.com/en/services): Strategic social media management to increase reach and audience engagement.
- [SEO](https://beaniwa.com/en/services): Organic search engine positioning to attract qualified visitors.
- [App Development](https://beaniwa.com/en/services): Custom mobile and web applications to optimize business processes.
- [Branding](https://beaniwa.com/en/services): Unique visual identity design that reflects your brand values.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://beaniwa.com/en/): General overview of the agency and its services.
- [Services](https://beaniwa.com/en/services): Full detail of all services offered.
- [Portfolio](https://beaniwa.com/en/portfolio): Completed projects including mercadoregional.com.mx, forjanorte.com.mx and alanquintana.pro.
- [About](https://beaniwa.com/en/about): Agency history and values.
- [Contact](https://beaniwa.com/en/contact): Contact form available on the site.
